task_completion.description: Microsoft Edge is configured with the three custom OSINT search engines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Edge 'Manage search engines' settings page show entries for Wayback Machine (keyword 'wayback'), crt.sh (keyword 'crt'), and Shodan (keyword 'shodan') with their respective URL templates.

task_completion.description: Wayback Machine search engine is verified with a search for 'example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser tab shows the Wayback Machine website loaded with results for 'example.com', and the address bar URL matches the pattern `https://web.archive.org/web/*/example.com`.

task_completion.description: crt.sh search engine is verified with a search for 'example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser tab shows the crt.sh website loaded with results for 'example.com', and the address bar URL matches the pattern `https://crt.sh/?q=example.com`.

task_completion.description: Shodan search engine is verified with a search for 'example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser tab shows the Shodan website loaded with results for 'example.com', and the address bar URL matches the pattern `https://www.shodan.io/search?query=example.com`.

task_completion.description: A report is created listing the configured tools and confirming their verification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows a file named `osint_config_report.txt` on the Desktop (`/home/ga/Desktop/osint_config_report.txt`). The content explicitly lists the three tools (Wayback Machine, crt.sh, Shodan) and confirms that the searches were successfully verified.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Edge graphical interface to configure the settings and perform searches.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Microsoft Edge browser windows, settings menus, and address bar, rather than just modifying configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually loaded the search results from the live OSINT services.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser tabs display the genuine web interfaces of Wayback Machine, crt.sh, and Shodan, proving the URLs were successfully resolved and loaded.

integrity.description: The report contains a genuine summary of the verification process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in `osint_config_report.txt` is written as a confirmation report rather than just a direct copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring three real OSINT services in Microsoft Edge: Wayback Machine (URL: https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s, Keyword: wayback), crt.sh (URL: https://crt.sh/?q=%s, Keyword: crt), and Shodan (URL: https://www.shodan.io/search?query=%s, Keyword: shodan). The test domain is 'example.com', which is an IANA-reserved domain for testing. The final report must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Desktop/osint_config_report.txt.
